MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-26-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER NICHOLAS JOHN SWANBERG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J MILLER; CLERK: M. JONES; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
